⏺ Bash(rm -rf node_modules && npm install)
  ⎿  Running…

│ Bash command                                                 │
│                                                              │
│   rm -rf node_modules && npm install                         │
│   Reinstall dependencies                                     │

│ Do you want to proceed?                                      │
│ ❯ 1. Yes                                                     │
│   2. Yes, and don't ask again for rm and npm commands        │
